YoungAge.title: Young
YoungAge.description: Your captain is young, sprightly and probably a bit naïve. Still a little green behind the ears {pawn_pronoun} may find {pawn_reflexive} a little out of {pawn_possessive} depth at times.

MiddleAge.title: Middle-aged
MiddleAge.description: Your captain is middle-aged. {pawn_pronoun} is experienced and relatively capable, having spent enough time in the chair to handle most situations.

OldAge.title: Old
OldAge.description: Your captain is older but also wiser. Though with age also comes the inevitable aching bones and {pawn_name} feels this just as much as anyone else. Living to this age in such a brutal time has to be commended though.
